subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who hath turned towards God, the Mighty, the All-Wise, that the attraction of the verses may seize him and cause him to voice the praise of his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن اقبل الی الله العزیز الحکیم لیاخذه جذب الایات و ینطقه بثناء ربه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
